zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marion Lauder於1410年之前出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾時，她的父親Sir John de Lawedre24歲，母親Lady Katherine Landells29歲。她於大約1435年與Alexander Erskine在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。她去世於1443年6月20日之後在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾登格拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marion Lauder于1410年之前出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Lawedre24岁，母亲Lady Katherine Landells29岁。她于大约1435年与Alexander Erskine在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。她去世于1443年6月20日之后在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾登格拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lauder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

variants.name: Lawter
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lawder
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lowther
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lauderdale
meanings: English: habitational name from the valley of Lauderdale, named from Lauder + either Old Norse dalr or Old English dæl ‘valley’.

variants.name: Lowder
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marion Lauder was born before 1410, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John de Lawedre, was 24 and her mother, Lady Katherine Landells, was 29. She married Alexander Erskine about 1435, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. She died after 20 June 1443, in Dunglass, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marion Lauder est née avant 1410, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Lawedre, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Landells, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Erskine environ 1435, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée après 20 juin 1443, à Dunglass, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marion Lauder vor 1410 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Lawedre 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Landells 29. Sie hat um 1435 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Erskine geheiratet. Sie starb nach 20. Juni 1443 in Dunglass, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Lauder è nata il prima del 1410 nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John de Lawedre, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Landells, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Erskine circa 1435, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì dopo il 20 giugno 1443, nel Dunglass, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Lauderが1410年以前にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Lawedreは24歳，母Lady Katherine Landellsは29歳であった。約1435年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンでAlexander Erskineと結婚した。彼女は1443年6月20日以後にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアダングラスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Lauder(이)가 1410년 이전 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Lawedre(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Landells(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Alexander Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1443년 6월 20일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 던글래스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Lauder nasceu antes 1410, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Lawedre, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Landells, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Erskine aproximadamente 1435, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu após 20 de junho de 1443, em Dunglass, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marion Lauder родилась перед 1410 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Lawedre было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Landells, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Erskine около 1435 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла после 20 июнь 1443 г. в местности дунгласс, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
